description: Simulates real-time WebSocket updates. The developer must implement an interval that fires every 2 seconds and emits events matching the payloads below.

sensor_update.description: Fired when a sensor reading changes in a room. Update the matching room sensor value and recompute all affected chart counts.

room_status.description: Fired when a room goes online or offline. Offline rooms must be excluded from all chart counts immediately.

rules: Only online rooms with a valid sensor reading are counted in charts.
When a sensor_update is received, recount all charts that include the affected room.
When a room_status changes, recount all charts that include that room.
Chart counts must reflect the latest state — recount from scratch on every update.
The interval must start on component init and be cleared on component destroy.
